title: Project Management - How Do I?
description:
Project Management - How Do I?

Project Management - How Do I...?

How do I create projects?

Use one of the following methods to create a project in Epson RC+ 8.0:

	Select New
	 from the Project menu.  This is the most common method for creating
	 a new project.
	Select Copy
	 from the Project menu.
	Select Save
	 As from the Project menu.

How do I rename a project?

Select Rename from the Project menu.

How do I backup a project?

Select Copy from the Project menu to backup your project.  It is recommended that you backup on another disk drive, such as a floppy disk or USB memory disk.

How do I remove files from a project?

	Select Edit
	 from the Project menu.
	Select Delete
	 from the File menu.
	Use the Project Explorer context
	 menu.  Right click on a file and select Remove or Delete.

How do I use project templates?

When you create a new project by selecting New from the Project menu, you can select a template for your project.  A template is a project stored in the EpsonRC80\Templates folder.  When your new project is created, the template project is copied to the new project folder.

How do I import projects into Epson RC+?

Select Import from the Project menu to import projects.
